name: Sarah Jenkins
title: Principal Broker
bio: A St. Louis native with 15 years of experience, Sarah specializes in luxury estates and corporate relocations in the Clayton and Ladue corridors.

name: Marcus Thorne
title: Senior Associate
bio: Marcus is the king of historic brick! He focuses on the preservation of South City architecture, specifically in Soulard and Benton Park.

name: Elena Rodriguez
title: Buyer's Specialist
bio: Elena loves helping first-time buyers navigate the competitive West County market. She is known for her patience and expert negotiation skills.

name: David 'Dutch' Van Horn
title: Commercial & Residential Specialist
bio: With a background in analytics, Dutch provides data-driven insights for investors looking at multi-family units in University City and Dogtown.

name: Chloe Whitmore
title: Listing Agent
bio: Chloe specializes in staging and marketing high-acreage properties in Wildwood and Eureka, ensuring sellers get top dollar for their land.
